polygon.style: animation: float 2s infinite ease-in-out; animation-delay: 0s; fill: #ff6347;

circle.style: animation: float 2s infinite ease-in-out; animation-delay: 0.5s; fill: #ffd700;

rect.style: animation: float 2s infinite ease-in-out; animation-delay: 1s; animation-name: float, colorChange; animation-duration: 2s, 5s;
